body:
APPROVE
The implementation satisfies the acceptance criteria and keeps the typed errors visible at the public `agent` API boundary. Focused verification passed with `go test ./internal/routing` and `go test . -run 'TestResolveRouteExplicit|TestExecute_ReturnsExplicit|ExampleErr'`; full `go test ./...` was blocked by sandbox localhost listener restrictions in unrelated `httptest` suites.
